description_long: This is a modern, minimalist axe with a single-piece construction, likely made entirely of metal. The handle is straight with a slight ergonomic curve and features three circular cutouts near the base, possibly for weight reduction or grip enhancement. The blade is broad and angular, with a pronounced cutting edge and a pointed tip opposite the handle. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, lacking any decorative elements or traditional wooden components. The surface appears smooth and metallic, with a matte or slightly reflective finish. There are no visible markings, engravings, or brand labels on the object.
description: A sleek, all-metal axe with a broad angular blade and a straight handle featuring three circular cutouts. The design is minimalist and modern, with a smooth metallic finish.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from a three-quarter angle, highlighting the broad blade, pointed tip, and the handle with three circular cutouts.
description_view_1: A top-down view showing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the axe's slim construction.
description_view_2: A mirrored three-quarter view similar to view 0, displaying the opposite side of the blade and handle cutouts.
description_view_3: A bottom-up view showing the narrow edge of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, all-metal handle with a slight ergonomic curve and three circular cutouts; flat cross-section, minimalist design.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, angular single-edge blade with a pointed tip and no beard or poll; smooth, functional geometry.
attribute_mounting_style: Single-piece construction; blade and handle are integrated, no separate mounting.
